mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_feedback ( session_id, music_fit, lighting_fit, focus_result, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{musicFit}, #{lightingFit}, #{focusResult}, #{memo}, #{createdAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE music_fit = VALUES(music_fit), lighting_fit = VALUES(lighting_fit), focus_result = VALUES(focus_result), memo = VALUES(memo), created_at = VALUES(created_at)
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, music_fit, lighting_fit, focus_result, memo, created_at FROM session_feedback WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
